# 📊 Project Assessment Overview

> This documentation provides a comprehensive assessment of the project, generated by the AI-powered modernization assessment tool. Use this page as your starting point to navigate through all assessment artifacts.

---

## Quick Start Guide

Follow this recommended reading order for the most effective understanding:

1. **[Architecture Diagram](architecture-diagram.md)** — Understand the big picture: system layers and component relationships
2. **[Dependency Map](dependency-map.md)** — Know what the project depends on and where the risks are
3. **[API & Service Contracts](api-service-contracts.md)** — See how services communicate and what contracts they expose
4. **[Data Architecture](data-architecture.md)** — Explore data models, storage, and data flow patterns
5. **[Configuration Inventory](configuration-inventory.md)** — Review how the application is configured across environments
6. **[Business Workflows](business-workflows.md)** — Trace end-to-end business processes and domain logic

---

## Documentation Structure

### 🏛️ Architecture & Dependencies

| Document | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [Architecture Diagram](architecture-diagram.md) | High-level application architecture and detailed component relationship diagrams with Mermaid visualizations |
| [Dependency Map](dependency-map.md) | External dependencies grouped by functional category — frameworks, databases, messaging, security, and more |

### 🔌 APIs & Data

| Document | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [API & Service Contracts](api-service-contracts.md) | Service inventory, API endpoints, communication patterns (sync/async), DTOs, and resilience policies |
| [Data Architecture](data-architecture.md) | Database configuration, entity models, data ownership boundaries, repository interfaces, and caching strategies |

### ⚙️ Configuration & Business Logic

| Document | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [Configuration Inventory](configuration-inventory.md) | Configuration sources, build/runtime profiles, externalized properties, secrets management, and feature flags |
| [Business Workflows](business-workflows.md) | Business processes end-to-end, domain entities, business rules, cross-service data flows, and decision logic |
